description: Style Note To deal with the AC blast at your workplace, or to counter that ocassional cool breeze, a shrug is just what you need. This striped, comfortable and colourful sweater from only can be coupled with a tank top for a cool and trendy look. Product Details An open front sweater with pink and charcoal grey alternate horizontal stripes. Has black ribbed edges around the neckline, front, hemlines and cuffs with batwing and raglan sleeves Material and Care 100% acrylic Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours or dry clean Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
